aboutPanel.title: About
aboutPanel.description: Modular report generator for structural calculations, daylight analysis, building code checks and more. Generates PDF reports in corporate identity.
aboutPanel.companyDescription: Open source tools for the AEC industry. Transparent, professional, and collaborative.

exportPanel.title: Export
exportPanel.asJsonDesc: Save the report as a JSON file
exportPanel.asPdfDesc: Generate and download the report as PDF
